svg.text: Trust mode: if trust=True, just UPPERCASE + collapse WS, skip all below
Replace / & with space, strip special chars
Trust: LIV TR -> LIVING TRUST, REV -> REVOCABLE
CORPORATION -> CORP, L L C -> LLC, L P -> LP
JUNIOR -> JR, SENIOR -> SR, SECOND -> II
Collapse single letters: J V S -> JVS
(skip IN, CO -- ambiguous with common words)
Strip NAME_SUFFIXES (JR,SR,II...) -> Acronym check (CSC=Corp Service Co -> 95)
Strip INDUSTRY_TERMS: EXPLORATION, DRILLING, OIL, GAS, PETROLEUM...
Direct JW | Sorted-tokens JW | Compact-alnum JW -> best_jw = max(all three)
If compact_jw >= 0.95 -> floor at compact_jw (handles compound words)
Bookend bonus: first+last tokens match (exact/initial/JW>=0.85) -> coeff >= 0.90
score = best_jw x (0.3 + 0.7 x overlap_coeff) -> round to nearest 5
Supplementary sources: DEC contact, Canvas address names (C/O, ATTN patterns), DEC address names
Name extraction strips role suffixes (MANAGER, AGENT, DIRECTOR...) | All capped at 0.95 | Best source wins
Trust mode: if trust=True, just UPPERCASE + collapse WS, skip all below
POST OFFICE BOX / P.O. BOX / POB / POP BOX -> PO BOX
Full address JW x (0.6 + 0.4 x city_sim) | Penalties: nums -0.10, zip -0.20
Strip all date patterns (JUNE 14 2012, 6-27-2022, 1999, 01/2020) before extracting nums
All similarity: max( JW(normalized), JW(compact_alnum) ) -> round to nearest 5
normalize_city: FT->FORT | normalize_zip: pad to 5 | parse_house_number
all nums match, both have nums
For each bucket: name_min <= score <= name_max AND addr_min <= score <= addr_max
First match wins | Fallback: NEEDS REVIEW
Any record not matching a configured bucket
Defaults are narrow (0-0 or 100-100) -- most records -> NEEDS REVIEW until tuned
12 config keys in Snowflake BA_CONFIG control the 3 bucket ranges
Regex on ALL four fields (any match -> is_trust=1):
LIVING TRUST | FAMILY TRUST | REVOCABLE TRUST
IRREVOCABLE TRUST | TESTAMENTARY | ESTATE OF | DECEDENT
Keywords from Snowflake BA_LOOKUP or defaults
Sorted by length descending (multi-word match first)
Address API Override -- Persistent Cache & Audit
Cache key: (input_address, city, state, zip) -> standardized output
verdict_json: full Google verdict object as JSON
name_compare() -> name_score (0--100), address_compare() -> addr_score (0--100) + same_address flag
if name_score < 95, check DEC contact + C/O + ATTN name extraction from addresses -> best wins, cap 0.95
_classify(name_score, addr_score, BUCKET_RULES) -- 3 configurable buckets + NEEDS REVIEW fallback
name_score 15--70 (API_SCORE_MIN/MAX) with SSN match -> Claude Sonnet 4.5 batches of 20 -> override -> reclassify
addr_score 15--65 (or zero-score rule) with SSN match -> validate/standardize -> re-score -> reclassify if delta >= 10
regex on Canvas name/address + DEC name/address -> is_trust flag -> trust-mode re-scoring (skip normalization)
Name match: >=85 | Initial match: 95 | Fuzzy token: JW>0.88 | Bookend: JW>=0.85 | Compact floor: JW>=0.95
Address same: street>=0.90 & zip_ok & city>=0.85 | PO Box same: score>=0.90 & city>=0.85 | Zip fail: city>=0.92 or x0.75
Non-standard: nums mismatch -0.10, zip mismatch -0.20, all match +0.50 | Google override: delta >= 10 to apply
All scores rounded to nearest 5 | Human review required -- no auto-merge | Google cache: 0 API calls on re-run | Config from Snowflake BA_CONFIG
